content.situation: 会议开始时，主持人邀请团队成员对新项目方案发表初步看法
content.speakerText: Alright team, we're ready to start—what are your initial thoughts on the new project plan?
content.speakerTextCn: 好了团队，我们准备开始了——你们对新项目计划有什么初步想法？

options: focus on user experience first because it's important
focus on user experience first, okay?
focus on user experience first and let's go

content.hint: 表达建议时，常用 'should' + 动词原形，简洁直接

content.situation: 会议中，主持人向负责数据的同事询问初步观察结果
content.speakerText: Jamie, you've been reviewing the user analytics—any early patterns you've spotted?
content.speakerTextCn: Jamie，你一直在查看用户数据分析，发现什么初步模式了吗？
content.responseTemplate: I've noticed some trends, but I'd need to ___ first
content.hint: 当信息不完整时，委婉表达需要更多时间准备，常用 'I'd need to + 动作' 结构
content.knowledgePoint: 委婉请求时间的礼貌表达

content.situation: 主持人希望确认团队对提案是否达成共识
content.speakerText: So, does everyone agree with moving forward with this approach?
content.speakerTextCn: 那么，大家同意继续采用这个方案吗？
content.hint: 表达简单同意时，英语中常用简洁口语化表达，避免冗长
content.knowledgePoint: 日常会议中表达同意的高频口语
